title: Membrane-Enriched Preparation of Culture Samples for Mass Spectrometry-Based Proteomics
author: Gwendolyn Gallagher
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdapi2dn
materials: Freeze sample (-80 C), then centrivap to dryness.

steps.title: Cell pellets resuspended in 333 uL...
steps.instruction: Cell pellets resuspended in 333 uL wash solution and lysed with QSonica high power sonication (15 min, 1 sec pulse, Ampl 85%) All samples were previously derived from 4.5 mL pure cultures spun down and flash frozen

steps.title: After sonication, the tubes were centrifuged...
steps.instruction: After sonication, the tubes were centrifuged (2500x g , 8 min) to pellet unlysed debris

steps.title: Supernatant was drawn off and added...
steps.instruction: Supernatant was drawn off and added to 830 uL carbonate extraction solution in a polypropylene microfuge tube It is very important to check that tubes are compatible with ultracentrifuge

steps.title: Shake samples in polypropylene tubes in...
steps.instruction: Shake samples in polypropylene tubes in 4 C for 1 hour

steps.title: After balancing tubes with additional carbonate...
steps.instruction: After balancing tubes with additional carbonate extraction solution, membrane pellets were spun down in an ultracentrifuge (115,000 x g , 1 hr)

steps.title: Draw off supernatant and preserve as...
steps.instruction: Draw off supernatant and preserve as “cytosolic” fraction and save pellet as “membrane” fraction.

steps.title: Dilute cytosolic fraction samples in 1:1...
steps.instruction: Dilute cytosolic fraction samples in 1:1 in exchange + 20 mM DDT. Additional Eppendorf tubes may be necessary.

steps.title: Alkylate cysteine thiols with 60 nM...
steps.instruction: Alkylate cysteine thiols with 60 nM iodoacetamide and incubate at room temperature for an hour in the dark.

steps.title: Disturb membrane pellets with QSonica high...
steps.instruction: Disturb membrane pellets with QSonica high power sonication (10 min, 1 sec pulse, Ampl 85%) in 500 uL LDS buffer + 20 mM DTT.

steps.title: Incubate samples at 95 C for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 95 C for 20 minutes

steps.title: Incubate samples at 37 C for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 37 C for 30 minutes

steps.title: Alkylate cysteine thiols with 60 nM...
steps.instruction: Alkylate cysteine thiols with 60 nM iodoacetamide and incubate at room temperature for an hour in the dark.

steps.title: Mix 50 uL lysate (membrane or...
steps.instruction: Mix 50 uL lysate (membrane or cytosolic fraction) with 400 uL exchange buffer on filter unit.

steps.title: Spin at 14,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Spin at 14,000 x g for 10 minutes and discard filtrate

steps.title: Repeat steps 13-14 until all lysate is concentrated on filter
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 13-14 until all lysate is concentrated on filter

steps.title: Wash filter unit 3 times with...
steps.instruction: Wash filter unit 3 times with 200 uL exchange buffer by spinning at 14,000 xg for 10 minutes.Discard filtrate each time.

steps.title: Wash filter 2 times with 200...
steps.instruction: Wash filter 2 times with 200 uL digestion buffer (spin down at 14,000 x g for 10 min)

steps.title: Transfer filter unit to passivated collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer filter unit to passivated collection tube.

steps.title: For MEMBRANE fraction
steps.instruction: For MEMBRANE fraction: add 100 uL digestion buffer and 2 ug chymotrypsin on filter.Incubate overnight at room temperature (seal tubes with parafilm).After overnight incubation, add 2 ug Trypsin and incubate again overnight at room temperature.

steps.title: For CYTOSOLIC fraction
steps.instruction: For CYTOSOLIC fraction: add 100 uL digestion buffer and 2 ug trypsin on filter.Incubate overnight at room temperature (seal tubes with parafilm).

steps.title: Centrifuge (14,000 x g for 10 minutes)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge (14,000 x g for 10 minutes). KEEP filtrate

steps.title: Add 50 uL peptide recovery buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL peptide recovery buffer and centrifuge for 10 minutes at 14,000 x g. KEEP filtrate

steps.title: Repeat step 21
steps.instruction: Repeat step 21

steps.title: Add 200 uL ethyl acetate to...
steps.instruction: Add 200 uL ethyl acetate to the filtrate and transfer to LoBind tube.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 uL TFA and vortex gently.

steps.title: Nearly fill each tube with ethyl...
steps.instruction: Nearly fill each tube with ethyl acetate, sonicate for 10 s (note: not high power), centrifuge at 14,000 x g for 10 minutes, then discard upper organic layer.

steps.title: Repeat step 25 two more times
steps.instruction: Repeat step 25 two more times.

steps.title: Place sample tubes (uncovered/caps off) in...
steps.instruction: Place sample tubes (uncovered/caps off) in Dry Block set to 60 C for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Dried samples can now be used...
steps.instruction: Dried samples can now be used for IPTL labeling or can be loaded on mass spec in 2% Acetonitrile, 0.1% formic acid as an unlabeled sample.
